objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 past conversation words, Past Simple questions and negatives with did/didn't, reading, speaking, listening, and homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. 20 өнгөрсөн цагийн ярианы үг, did/didn't асуулт ба үгүйсгэл, унших, ярих, сонсох, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Master past simple questions and negatives with did and didn't to talk about the past.
contentMn: Did, didn't ашиглан өнгөрсөн цагийн асуулт, үгүйсгэл хийж сурна.

vocabulary.example: Last time I visited in June.

quiz.question: I _____ go — I stayed home.
quiz.explanation: Past negative uses didn't + base verb.

quiz.question: Which is correct?
quiz.explanation: After didn't always use base verb.

quiz.question: How long did Bat study?
quiz.explanation: Bat said he studied for two hours.

quiz.question: Why didn't Bat watch videos?
quiz.explanation: Bat said he didn't have time.

quiz.question: What did Sarnai do last evening?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai cooked, did homework, and called her grandmother.

quiz.question: What time did Sarnai go to bed?
quiz.explanation: She went to bed at midnight.

quiz.question: Why did Sarnai go to bed late?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai said the homework was very long.

quiz.question: What follows did/didn't?
quiz.explanation: After did/didn't always use base verb.

page1.grammarTopic: Past Simple — questions and negatives with did / didn't
page1.grammarExplanation: To make QUESTIONS in Past Simple: DID + subject + BASE VERB + ? → 'Did you go?' 'Did she eat?' 'What did he do?' To make NEGATIVES: subject + DIDN'T + BASE VERB → 'I didn't go.' 'She didn't eat.' CRITICAL RULE: After DID or DIDN'T, ALWAYS use the BASE VERB — NEVER the past form! Өнгөрсөн цагийн АСУУЛТ: DID + субьект + ҮНДСЭН ҮЙЛҮГ? ҮГҮЙСГЭЛ: субьект + DIDN'T + ҮНДСЭН ҮЙЛҮГ. ЧУХАЛ ДҮРЭМ: DID/DIDN'T-ийн дараа ҮРГЭЛЖ ҮНДСЭН ҮЙЛҮГ — өнгөрсөн цагийн хэлбэрийг ХЭЗЭЭ Ч хэрэглэдэггүй!
commonMistakes: Did you went to school? → Did you GO to school?
She didn't ate → She didn't EAT
I not go yesterday → I DIDN'T go yesterday
You did go? → DID you go?

page2.readingPassage: Sarnai asked Bat about his weekend. 'Did you go anywhere?' 'Yes! I went to the National Museum.' 'Did you enjoy it?' 'I loved it! But I didn't understand everything.' 'What did you see?' 'I saw old Mongolian art and read about history. I didn't take photos because it wasn't allowed.' 'That sounds amazing! Why didn't I go with you?' said Sarnai.
speakingQuestions: What did you do last weekend? / Та өнгөрсөн долоо хоногийн амралтаар юу хийсэн бэ?
Did you go anywhere interesting last month?
What didn't you do this week that you wanted to do?
Did you enjoy your English lessons this week?
Why didn't you study yesterday? (practice saying this!)
How long did you sleep last night?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What did you do last weekend?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I went to the park and met some friends.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: No, I didn't go alone. I went with my sister.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Yes, we stayed for three hours!

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I'm sorry! I forgot my phone at home.

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Teacher: Let's practice questions and negatives. Bat, did you do your homework last night? Bat: Yes I did! I studied for two hours. Teacher: Good! Did you watch any English videos? Bat: No, I didn't watch videos. I didn't have time. Teacher: That's OK. Sarnai, what did you do last evening? Sarnai: I cooked dinner, did my homework, and called my grandmother. Teacher: Did you enjoy your evening? Sarnai: Yes! But I didn't sleep enough — I went to bed at midnight! Teacher: Oh no! Why didn't you go to bed earlier? Sarnai: Because the homework was very long!

listeningQuestions.question: What did Sarnai do last evening?
What time did Sarnai go to bed?
Why did Sarnai go to bed late?

homework: Writing: Write 5 questions to ask a friend about their weekend using 'Did you...?'
Vocabulary: Write 5 sentences: 2 with 'did', 2 with 'didn't', 1 with 'why didn't'.
Speaking: Ask a family member 3 questions about their day using 'did' — write the answers.
Review: DID + base verb (question) · DIDN'T + base verb (negative) — NEVER past form after did/didn't!
completionSummary: Mastered Did / Didn't questions and negatives
